song_name: This Is How We Do It

versions.song_name: This Is How We Do It
This Is How We Do It

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: This Is How We Do It

content:
This Is How We Do It
Montell Jordan

[Intro]
N.C.
This is how we do it.
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]        [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
This is how we do it. x3[/tab]
Sha na na……

[Verse]
N.C.
This is how we do it.
N.C.
It's Friday night,
      N.C.
and I feel all right

    N.C.
The party is here on the West side
[tab]     [ch]Fm7[/ch]
So I reach for my 40 and I turn it up[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                        [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
Designated driver take the keys to my truck[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]
  Hit the shore 'cause I'm faded[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
Honeys in the street say, "Monty, yo we made it!"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                               [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
  It feels so good in my hood tonight[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]
The summertime skirts and the guys in Kanai[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                    [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
All the gang-bangers forgot about the drive-by[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]
  You gotta get your groove on,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
before you go get paid[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
So tip up your cup and throw your hands up[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]                   [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
And let me hear the party say[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]
I'm kinda buzzed and it's all because[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
(This is how we do it)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]
South Central does it like nobody does[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]             [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
(This is how we do it)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
To all my neighbors you got much flavor[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]             [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
(This is how we do it)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Let's flip up the track, bring the old school back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
(This is how we do it)[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]
This is how we do it,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
all hands are in the air[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]
And wave them from here to there[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
If you're an O.G. mack or a wanna-be player[/tab]

N.C.
You see the hood's been good to me
Ever- since I was a lower-case G
But now I'm a big G. Now the girls see I got
da money, hundred-dollar bills y'all
[tab]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
If you were from where I'm from then[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
   you would know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]
That I gotta get mine in a big black truck[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]                    [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
You can get yours in a '64[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]
   Whatever it is,[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
the party's underway[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
So tip up your cup and throw your hands up[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
And let me hear the party say[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]
I'm kinda buzzed and it's all because[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
 (This is how we do it)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]
 South Central does it like nobody does[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]             [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
 (This is how we do it)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
 YNV, SCC, all my homies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
 (This is how we do it)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
 I'll never come wack on an old school track[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
 (This is how we do it)[/tab]

[Rap]
N.C.
Check it out!
Once upon a time in '94
Montell made no money and life sure was slow
All they said was 6'8" he stood
And people thought the music that he made was good
There lived a D.J. and Paul was his name
He came up to Monty, this is what he said
You and OG are gonna make some cash
Sell a million records and we'll make in a dash
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]
Oh I'm buzzing          because[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]              [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
(This is how we do it)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]
South Central does it like nobody does[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]             [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
(This is how we do it)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fm7[/ch]
To all my neighbors you got much flavor[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]             [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
(This is how we do it)[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm7[/ch]
Let's flip up the track, bring the old school back[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm7[/ch]            [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
(This is how we do it)[/tab]

repeat to end
